feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Task Center cannot connect SAP BPA because Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS not recogniz
entry.content:
Hey there,

we got a strange situation. We have set up SAP Work Zone, advanced edition in one subaccount and also SAP Task Center in this subaccount. It works fine. Even tasks of Work Zone get into the Task Center. We have a destination for Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS in this subaccount, and the service status is also okay.

So now we want to add SAP Build Process Automation with plan build-default that lives in another subaccount. So we got into the subaccount of Work Zone and Task Center and created the destination SAPBuildPA_rem, as it is in another subaccount. As soon as we enable the Task Center on this destination with tc.enabled=true, Task Center Administration will recognize it, but say there is an error. I think it was something like Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS also needs to be there, and somehow the service tab then also showed errors for the service now. We added the Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS destination as well for the subaccount of SAP BPA, even though it's not stated in the documentation. But somehow it will still fail for the SAPBuildPA_rem destination in the Task Center Administration and say Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS could not be found for subaccount ID <where SAP BPA lives>, which is not true, as this destination exists.

What is wrong?

Due to connectivity issues the next try to get task data will start in 30 seconds. Exception: {"error":{"code":"sap.workflowservice.ids.unavailable","message":"Unable to find destination Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS for tenant: '********************'"}}

 

We have problems in general that we can also not get SAP Build Process Automation into Work Zone advanced. The inbox also states an error. The authentication of SAP BPA is behind a corporate IDP, and for Work Zone and Task Center, it is not. But this still makes no sense for the main Task Center error.

Kind regards

entry.title: Enable AI Features for SAP Work Zone advanced
entry.content:
Hello community,

currently there is a promotional offer that you can activate AI features in SAP Work Zone advanced edition for free until 30.06.2026. This documentation describes (more or less) what you need to do to use it: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-advanced-edition/sap-build-work-zone-advanced-edition/enabling-ai-features?locale=en-US

It only states that you need to have an integration with SAP AI Core in specific data centers. We created an instance of SAP AI Core Standard edition in the same subaccount as Work Zone advanced, but it says in Work Zone that when you want to activate the feature, the AI ability is not successfully connected. What do we need to do to integrate those instances/systems?

Is anybody able to run this?

entry.title: Joule Navigational Scenario in SAP Work Zone Advanced
entry.content:
Hello, we are not able to use Joule in SAP Work Zone Advanced for navigational uses. I read that most guides are for the Work Zone Standard Edition. So I'm not sure if it works for Work Zone Advanced as well.

Here (https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/integrating-joule-with-sap/constraints-for-joule?locale=en-US), it states:

  • Joule uses SAP Build Work Zone for navigational scenarios. This implies that Identity Provisioning Service (IPS) must be enabled and configured for user assignment to the navigation content.

But what does that mean? What needs to be done? What are prompts or situations to test if it works? I also tried to use a prompt like "Navigate me to the Business Development workspace" but this doesn't work.

How do I set it up correctly?

entry.title: Widget to show a feed containing more than 15 items
entry.content:
I'm using a Workzone content widget to display blog posts contained in a specified content folder. Great.

The max number of items it can display is 15. This means posts that drop out of the top 15 simply aren't displayed and they're lost to users. The widget doesn't have paging controls, which seems like a bit of an oversight. How are colleagues supposed to find older articles?

I've had a look through the other widgets and I can't find anything that will serve as a long-term space for blog type articles. 

What's the solution here?

entry.title: I have no subscription option for Workzone
entry.content:
Hello,

I can only create an instance for SAP Build Workzone in my subaccount (not trial), but there is no subscription option:


I have all entitles for Workzone in my global account:

I have also subscribed to the Cloud Identity Service, but in the Trust Configuration, I have a different tenant for the Cloud Identity Service than the one in my subscriptions. Could this be the source of my problem with the missing Workzone subscription option?

Cloud Identity Service-Tenant in my Thrust:

Cloud-Identity-Service-Tenant in "Instances and Subscriptions":

I would be thankful if somebody can help me.

Best regards
Timur

entry.title: Implementing a Public/Anonymous SAPUI5 Registration App on BTP with Backend Data Validation
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I am working on a registration application using SAPUI5 on SAP BTP. I have a prototype ready, but I need guidance on two specific technical issues:

  1. Deployment for public access: How can I deploy this registration app so it is publicly available for anyone to use without requiring a login or IAS authentication? I need the app to be accessible to external users who do not have system credentials.
  2. Accessing system data for verification: How can I securely access our backend system data from this public application? The goal is to verify if a customer already exists in our system (e.g., checking by Email or BP) before they register. Since the user is anonymous, what is the best way to handle the connection to the backend?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Why has cut-and-paste behaviour changed? [Rant]
entry.content:
So we know cutting-and-pasting can be a bit of a nightmare in Workzone because by default ctrl-v pastes in any formatting from the source material. This means that unless your editors are well drilled you get inconsistent formatting across your pages that need reformatting. 

But I'm sure many of us knew that ctrl-shift-v pastes without source formatting, so this is a simple workaround that's as easy to use as ctrl-v.

But NOW, following this week's (again unnannouced) release we're seeing a new paste behaviour: When pasting formatted text we're invited to choose from 

  1. keep source formatting
  2. clear formatting
  3. match destination formatting. 

So as a user I now have to select one of these options (none of which dismissed the modal), and if I select 1 or 2 (or just ctrl-shift-v), the content is placed on a new line.

I've counted the interactions. What was previously 1 interaction (ctrl-shift-v) is now somewhere between 3 and 10 interactions depending on your choices and how hard it is to re-combine your sentence. Plus you HAVE to move your hand from keyboard to mouse because you can't dismiss the modal with escape, adding friction to the whole experience

Well done SAP for breaking something as foundational as cutting and pasting. <slow clap>

entry.title: Enhancement Ideas on SAP Build Work Zone - Permission, Workspace Admin, Content Approval
entry.content:
Hello Work Zone users and administrators,

As our company also started using SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition as an "intranet" as a start, there are few opportunities of enhancement that, we think, will greatly help large scale organisations with complex matrix and content management to adopt the product more effectively.

We have raised few enhancement requests and wish you take few mins to vote and support our ideas to SAP.

(1) Select which Sub-workspace the User be Made Workspace Admin WHEN Making User Main Workspace Admin
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#371329)
Currently, when a user is made Workspace Admin for the a main workspace, the user is also automatically made Workspace Admin in ALL the sub-workspaces that are nested under that main workspace.

We proposed to enhance to prompt to allow the admin to select which sub-workspace(s) should the user be made workspace admin WHEN making him/her Workspace Admin for the main workspace.

The proposed enhancement will address the following problem:

(1) For companies that will use sub-workspaces as departmental/sectional site, this enhancement will prevent a user (who is a representative of a department) to have unnecessary/excessive admin right for other sub-workspace(s).

(2) With this enhancement, the access to a private folder created in a departmental/sectional sub-workspace will only truly be accessible to the relevant Workspace Admin(s), instead of all the workspace admin that inherits the right from the main workspace, bring more meanings to create a private folder.

(3) This enhancement will allow the departmental user to maintain the right to mirror content from their responsible sub-workspace (folders) to the Main Workspace (folders) which serves as the HOME of a company site to display content that comes from the department, at the same time ensuring a stricter admin permission on sub-workspace level.

The proposed enhancement will allow smoother dynamics of content sharing and folder management, and adopt flexible workspace administrator matrix to cope with more complex organisation structure that naturally needs to invite more content owner to come into play.

(2) Mirror Multiple Content to Multiple Destination Folder at a Time
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#371324)

Currently, workspace admin can only mirror content/file to a destination folder one by one.

We propose to enhance the platform to allow mirroring multiple content/file to multiple destination folders within/across workspaces/sub-workspaces at a time.

The proposed enhancement will great reduce the time spent in mirroring a certain volume of content/files to multiple workspaces, drastically reduce the clicks and navigation in the content/files mirroring process.

This would be greatly beneficial to large scale companies/conglomerates with multiple workspaces for their subsidiaries/business units who have central content owner who is responsible for distributing global content/files to those sub-workspaces. Currently, it is very painful for the global content owners to mirror content one by one with repetitive clicks and navigation.

(3) Set Content Approval Not only for Workspace with Full Collaboration Level
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
(#360103)

Currently, only when a workspace collaboration level is set to 'Full', can content approval be configured for that workspace.  In cases where a workspace is set to 'Read Only' and only workspace admin can publish content (e.g. blog post), it will be beneficial to allow content approval on workspace admin level to facilitate and ensure content governance before the content gets published to the general members.    This will lessen the content drafting, editing and reviewing off the platform and offline back-and-forth communication.

In cases where a workspace is set to 'Read Only' and only workspace admin can publish content (e.g. blog post), it will be beneficial to allow content approval on workspace admin level to facilitate and ensure content governance before the content gets published to the general members.

We strongly believe companies that use WorkZone as one-way communication and that has strong and strict content publishing guideline would be beneficial from this suggestion. This suggestion will add a layer to ensure content aligns the company's tone and style before the content gets published within the WorkZone application.

Thank you for reading through and your vote!

Cheers,
Max

entry.title: HTML5 (Custom Fiori) app fails with 500 (token exchange) in TST only – works in DEV & ACC landscape
entry.content:
We have a custom HTML5 app deployed to the HTML5 Application Repository and launched via managed Launchpad / Work Zone.

  •  DEV – works
  • ACC – works
  • TST – fails

Same MTA, same UI artifacts, same configuration pattern across all landscapes.

Problem (TST only)

  • /index.html
  • /manifest.json
  • /Component-preload.js

All return:
HTTP 500 – Internal Server Error Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'url') identityzone undefined / clientid undefined

This happens for all users and occurs before any backend (CAP) call.

What is already verified

  1. HTML5 app is correctly uploaded and visible via cf html5-list
  2. Single app ID
  3. public visibility
  4. HTML5 repository destination exists and matches ACC:
  • sap.cloud.service
  • uri / content_endpoint
  • app_host_id
  • xsappname
  • OAuth2ClientCredentials
  • HTML5 repo host service key contains valid UAA data
  • Work Zone content provider updated
  • Same issue when launching via HTML5 Applications (not Work Zone specific)
  • Other HTML5 apps run fine in the same TST subaccount

Key observation
Since static files fail, this looks like a managed approuter / Launchpad runtime token‑exchange failure, not a CAP or UI build issue.

Has anyone seen a case where:

  • HTML5 repo content is present and public
  • Repository destination & service key are correct
  • DEV/ACC work
  • but one landscape fails with 500 during managed runtime token exchange?

Is this a known:

  • Launchpad runtime issue?
  • HTML5 repository runtime issue?
  • Internal managed destination / UAA resolution issue?
  • Any pointers, SAP Notes, or similar experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance 

Regards,
Raghav

entry.title: Custom Visualization error "Cannot load tile"
entry.content:
I have followed below thread for Implement a Custom Visualization Tile Launchpad,
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/implement-a-custom-visualization-tile-launchpad/qaq-p/12483243

Created
1. VisualAPP
2. TargetApp

In BTP Workzone, I don't see target app in page to assign; where as i can add to a group/role/catalog

In site settings, I have set the Asynchronous Module Loading as No.

How to add app in pages?
In targetApp, manifest.json added below lines, after that i dont see in pages to assign.

 "sap.cloud.portal": {      
     "ztargetsem-display": {
         "vizType": "zvisualtilemodule"
      }
    }

how to enable the app in page?
Please advise.

entry.title: Build Work Zone: No Content Items Created from S/4HANA FLP Content Exposure (0/0)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently integrating SAP Build Work Zone (Standard Edition) with an SAP S/4HANA on‑premise system using Launchpad Content Exposure to SAP BTP (Exposure Version 2).

Although the content exposure in S/4HANA seems to be set up correctly, no content items are created in Build Work Zone after channel synchronization.

Observed Behavior

  • The FLP Content Exposure runs successfully in S/4HANA
  • JSON content is generated for:
    • Business Apps
    • Catalogs
    • Groups
    • Roles
  • In Build Work Zone → Channel Manager, the channel status shows Updated
  • However, the Channel Report shows:

    Content Items: 0 / 0
    No content items were created or updated

Expected Behavior

  • Catalogs, apps, and groups exposed from S/4HANA should be converted into content items in Build Work Zone and become available for site usage.

Configuration Details

  • S/4HANA FLP content includes:
    • Business apps (homepage, search)
    • Catalogs assigned to roles
    • Role created specifically for Build Work Zone consumption
  • Content exposure uses Exposure Version 2
  • Channel is created in Build Work Zone in automatic mode
  • Cloud connector and destination setup is in place

Checks Already Done

  • Verified that FLP catalogs are assigned to the role
  • Verified that the role is included in content exposure
  • Channel synchronization completes without errors
  • No errors in BWZ logs, only empty content result

Questions

  1. Which technical roles are mandatory for the S/4HANA user (or technical integration user) to allow Build Work Zone to read FLP content?
  2. Is any additional role required for content item generation?
  3. Are there additional authorization objects (e.g. /UI2/FLP_CONT) that are required?
  4. Are there known prerequisites or limitations when using Exposure Version 2 with Build Work Zone?
  5. Any checks or logs you would recommend to identify why content items are not being generated?

Any guidance or pointers would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Please find the screenshots below for your reference.

Kind regards,
Om Prakash Jha

entry.title: SAp Build Work Zone Advanced: How to call a workpage which in not listed in the Navigation
entry.content:
Hello,

I face the following problem: Ich have reated some Component Cards for the Work Zone. The first shows short infos and should link to a workpage with the other Component Card which should show the whole information set. But this workpage to show the whole information should not be visible in the navigation, because it should work as a generic template. When this page is listed in the navigation, everything works fine, if not or switched to hidden, I get "Access denied". Is it possible to get this working? 

I hope someone can help.

Thanks
Ralf

entry.title: Why don't named anchors work in Work Zone?
entry.content:
Why can't a drop a named anchor into a block of text in Work Zone? 

E.g.

<p>lots of text text text ... <a name ="section2">Section 2</a> text text text...</p>

I can write this into a text widget using the view source function, but if a link to this anchor is clicked elsewhere it doesn't jump the page to the anchor - it doesn't work like normal basic HTML works. 

This is annoying, there are lots of instances I'd like to link to content halfway down a page, as you can probably imagine for long knowledgebase articles. 

Please make named anchors work.

entry.title: Workzone feature request channel in SAP influence opportunity platform ...gone!
entry.content:
Where has the Workzone feature request board gone?

It was part of the influence opportunity platform here: Influence Opportunity Homepage - Customer Influence

I'd raised half a dozen requests recently but now my number of requests is showing as 0 and my bookmark to the WZ forum doesn't work. 

Feels a bit like SAP just wanted us to shut up.

entry.title: Refreshing Integration Card Data on Dialog Close from Shell Plugin in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP Build Work Zone (Advanced Edition), where I have implemented a Shell Plugin that opens a custom dialog.

Requirement:
After the dialog is closed, I need to trigger a refresh in an Integration Card that is present on the Work Zone Home screen. This refresh should result in the card fetching the latest data via its configured API.

I am looking for guidance on how to properly establish communication between a Shell Plugin and an Integration Card in this scenario.

Questions:

  • What is the recommended way to trigger or notify an Integration Card to refresh from a Shell Plugin?

  • Are there any supported communication mechanisms between Shell Plugins and Integration Cards in Work Zone Advanced?

  • Is there a standard approach to externally trigger a card’s data refresh or API call?

  • How are such cross-component interactions typically handled in Work Zone architecture?

Additional Context:
The Integration Card is developed using a standard MVC approach, with separate view and controller files handling the presentation and logic.

Any guidance, best practices, or references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Problem with workzone text widget display
entry.content:
What's happened with how text widgets display edit mode??!

It used to be the case that editing a text widget displayed all the text in the editable panel - often a very tall panel for pages with lots of text.

Since about a week ago, now when I select to edit a text widget, it displays a truncated version of the text - 20 lines or so. Any editing of the text snaps the text widget to display full height - which is necessary as there's no way to scroll the widget otherwise. 

This means that my first action when editing a text widget is to enter a line break somewhere then immediately delete it, which forces the widget to go full height. This is super annoying. 

I'm using Edge on Windows. In experimenting whilst writing this I've found it only happens with a browser zoom set to 100%. If I shrink or expand the browser zoom the text widget in edit mode snaps to the correct height. 

Attached - screengrab showing the truncated text widget in edit more. The amount of text in this widget is many times greater than that exposed in the widget.

Please sort this out.

entry.title: sap build work zone advanced edition i have changed site menu as vertical but menu is disappeared.
entry.content: For the SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition site, I changed the site menu to vertical, but the menu has disappeared. The edit option is also not visible. How can I revert the site menu back to the horizontal?

entry.title: For the SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition site, I changed the site menu to vertical, but the menu
entry.content: For the SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition site, I changed the site menu to vertical, but the menu has disappeared. The edit option is also not visible. How can I revert the site menu back to the horizontal

entry.title: SAP DRC France
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I am working for SAP DRC setup for France in ECC system.

Do we need to activate both technical and XML setups like for Electronic Invoice via PEPPOL and Electronic Invoice via approved platform?

 

When I checked entries at table EDOCOMPPROCCOMV, system allowing for service related to approved PA.

Please assist, thank you 

Satya

entry.title: Work Zone advanced Edition cdm_export_service
entry.content:
We would like to extract information from the Content Cards in BTP Work Zone Advanced Edition via cdm_export_service/v1/export/Entities. For example, we are trying to download the ZIP file via the portal service using this body:
{
‘entityRefs’: [
{ ‘ID’: ‘dws-widget-mr923ntn’, “Type”: ‘catalog’ }
]
}
Unfortunately, we only receive an Error.json file containing the following information:
[{‘detailedErrorID’:301,‘errorType’:‘General’,‘errorMessage’:‘Request failed with status code 500’,‘agentId’:‘content-repository’,“correlationId”:‘c9d732e3-0d30-42ae-5d0a-1cbb142679d8’}]
Are we doing something wrong, or is this simply not possible in the Advanced Edition?
Thanks for your help.
Jens

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
